node.name: Characteristic 2
node.statement:
A ring $R$ is said to have \textbf{characteristic~$2$} if
\[
p + p = 0 \qquad \text{for all } p \in R. \tag{10}
\]

current_dependencies.name: Boolean Ring
current_dependencies.gloss: [Boolean Ring] An idempotent ring with unit.

current_dependencies.name: Idempotent Element
current_dependencies.gloss: [Idempotent Element] An element p of a ring R with p*p = p.
